description: M-26-14 Element 4: Detects unusual ILM operations in ES audit logs (high_count + rare, 1h)

detectors.detector_description: Unusual ILM action volume — spike in index admin operations
Rare delete operations — unexpected index deletion pattern

custom_settings.m2614_requirement: Element 4 — Data Retention | M-26-14 §1 Retention Requirements | Element 5 Two-Gate Retirement Enforcement
custom_settings.m2614_acceptance_criteria: Fires when bulk delete ops exceed 5x rolling hourly baseline. Fires for any delete on m2614-* indices outside established ILM rollover pattern.
custom_settings.m2614_description: M-26-14 Element 4: Detects anomalous ILM state transition events or unexpected index deletion/purge operations in Elasticsearch audit logs. Learns baseline rate of normal ILM operations and raises anomaly when delete or settings-update events spike. The rare detector catches targeted attacks against m2614-* compliance indices that might evade volume threshold checks. M-26-14 §1 (data retention), Element 5 (two-gate retirement enforcement). Required for Element 4 L3+ and Element 5 L4 compliance health monitoring. NOTE: Requires Elasticsearch audit logging enabled — logs-elasticsearch.audit-* must be populated.
